message.content:
@startuml
namespace com.jue.meet.model {
    class AddFriendModel <<C>> {
        age : int
        contactName : String
        contactPhone : String
        desc : String
        isContact : boolean
        nickName : String
        photo : String
        sex : boolean
        title : String
        type : int
        userId : String
        
        getAge()
        getContactName()
        getContactPhone()
        getDesc()
        getNickName()
        getPhoto()
        getTitle()
        getType()
        getUserId()
        isContact()
        isSex()
        setAge()
        setContact()
        setContactName()
        setContactPhone()
        setDesc()
        setNickName()
        setPhoto()
        setSex()
        setTitle()
        setType()
        setUserId()
        
    }

    class AllFriendModel <<C>> {
        desc : String
        nickName : String
        sex : boolean
        url : String
        userId : String
        
        getDesc()
        getNickName()
        getUrl()
        getUserId()
        isSex()
        setDesc()
        setNickName()
        setSex()
        setUrl()
        setUserId()
        
    }

    class ChatRecordModel <<C>> {
        endMsg : String
        nickName : String
        time : String
        unReadSize : int
        url : String
        userId : String
        
        getEndMsg()
        getNickName()
        getTime()
        getUnReadSize()
        getUrl()
        getUserId()
        setEndMsg()
        setNickName()
        setTime()
        setUnReadSize()
        setUrl()
        setUserId()
        
    }

    class StarModel <<C>> {
        nickName : String
        photoUrl : String
        userId : String
        
        getNickName()
        getPhotoUrl()
        getUserId()
        setNickName()
        setPhotoUrl()
        setUserId()
        
    }

    class UserInfoModel <<C>> {
        bgColor : int
        content : String
        title : String
        
        getBgColor()
        getContent()
        getTitle()
        setBgColor()
        setContent()
        setTitle()
        
    }

    class ChatModel <<C>> {
        address : String
        imgUrl : String
        la : double
        lo : double
        localFile : File
        mapUrl : String
        messageTime : long
        text : String
        type : int
        
        getAddress()
        getImgUrl()
        getLa()
        getLo()
        getLocalFile()
        getMapUrl()
        getMessageTime()
        getText()
        getType()
        setAddress()
        setImgUrl()
        setLa()
        setLo()
        setLocalFile()
        setMapUrl()
        setMessageTime()
        setText()
        setType()
        
    }


}



@enduml
